title: 批量获取虚拟机概览信息
title_en: Batch Retrieval of Virtual Machine Summary Information
code:
$ns   = 'root\virtualization\v2'
$vsms = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService

# RequestedInformation 常用码(子集):
#   0=Name(GUID) 1=ElementName 2=CreationTime 3=Notes
#   100=NumberOfProcessors 101=EnabledState 102=ProcessorLoad
#   103=ProcessorLoadHistory 104=MemoryUsage 105=Heartbeat 106=UpTime
#   107=GuestOperatingSystem 108=Snapshots 110=HealthState
$req = [uint32[]]@(0,1,2,3,100,101,102,104,105,106,107,110)

# 收集所有已实现虚拟机的 VirtualSystemSettingData,将其 __PATH 引用一次性传入。
$allVssd = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData |
           Where-Object { $_.VirtualSystemType -eq 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:System:Realized' }
$paths = @($allVssd | ForEach-Object { $_.__PATH })

$r = $vsms.GetSummaryInformation([string[]]$paths, $req)   # 返回码 0=成功, 4096=异步 Job
if ($r.ReturnValue -ne 0) { throw "GetSummaryInformation rv=$($r.ReturnValue)" }

foreach ($info in $r.SummaryInformation) {
  [pscustomobject]@{
    ElementName  = $info.ElementName
    Guid         = $info.Name
    EnabledState = $info.EnabledState
    vCPU         = $info.NumberOfProcessors
    MemoryUsage  = $info.MemoryUsage
    ProcLoad     = $info.ProcessorLoad
    Heartbeat    = $info.Heartbeat
    UpTime       = $info.UpTime
    HealthState  = $info.HealthState
  }
}
code_en:
$ns   = 'root\virtualization\v2'
$vsms = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService

# Common RequestedInformation codes (subset):
#   0=Name(GUID) 1=ElementName 2=CreationTime 3=Notes
#   100=NumberOfProcessors 101=EnabledState 102=ProcessorLoad
#   103=ProcessorLoadHistory 104=MemoryUsage 105=Heartbeat 106=UpTime
#   107=GuestOperatingSystem 108=Snapshots 110=HealthState
$req = [uint32[]]@(0,1,2,3,100,101,102,104,105,106,107,110)

# Collect the VirtualSystemSettingData of all realized virtual machines and pass their __PATH references in a single call.
$allVssd = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData |
           Where-Object { $_.VirtualSystemType -eq 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:System:Realized' }
$paths = @($allVssd | ForEach-Object { $_.__PATH })

$r = $vsms.GetSummaryInformation([string[]]$paths, $req)   # ReturnValue 0=success, 4096=asynchronous Job
if ($r.ReturnValue -ne 0) { throw "GetSummaryInformation rv=$($r.ReturnValue)" }

foreach ($info in $r.SummaryInformation) {
  [pscustomobject]@{
    ElementName  = $info.ElementName
    Guid         = $info.Name
    EnabledState = $info.EnabledState
    vCPU         = $info.NumberOfProcessors
    MemoryUsage  = $info.MemoryUsage
    ProcLoad     = $info.ProcessorLoad
    Heartbeat    = $info.Heartbeat
    UpTime       = $info.UpTime
    HealthState  = $info.HealthState
  }
}

notes: GetSummaryInformation 在 Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService 上调用,为同步读操作,返回码 0 表示成功(非异步 Job)。
方法签名: GetSummaryInformation(SettingData[] IN, RequestedInformation uint32[] IN) -> (ReturnValue uint32, SummaryInformation Msvm_SummaryInformationBase[] OUT)。输出参数名为 SummaryInformation。
SettingData 参数为 Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData 的引用数组,直接传入各 VSSD 的 __PATH 字符串数组即可(PowerShell 按 ref 处理)。一次传入多个 path 可批量返回多行结果。
仅枚举已实现虚拟机时,以 VirtualSystemType -eq 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:System:Realized' 过滤 VSSD,避免将快照或计划态配置一并计入。
RequestedInformation 决定返回哪些字段。运行时统计类字段(NumberOfProcessors、MemoryUsage、ProcessorLoad、Heartbeat、HealthState、UpTime)仅在虚拟机运行时填充;关机虚拟机上这些字段为空或为 0,属正常现象。
EnabledState=3 表示 Disabled(已关机)。身份字段 ElementName 与 Name(GUID)始终可读,不受运行状态影响。
notes_en: GetSummaryInformation is invoked on Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService and is a synchronous read operation; a ReturnValue of 0 indicates success (not an asynchronous Job).

Method signature: GetSummaryInformation(SettingData[] IN, RequestedInformation uint32[] IN) -> (ReturnValue uint32, SummaryInformation Msvm_SummaryInformationBase[] OUT). The output parameter is named SummaryInformation.

The SettingData parameter is a reference array of Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData; the array of __PATH strings for each VSSD can be passed in directly (PowerShell handles it by ref). Passing multiple paths at once returns multiple rows of results in a single batch.
To enumerate only realized virtual machines, filter the VSSD by VirtualSystemType -eq 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:System:Realized' to avoid including snapshots or planned-state configurations.

RequestedInformation determines which fields are returned. The runtime statistics fields (NumberOfProcessors, MemoryUsage, ProcessorLoad, Heartbeat, HealthState, UpTime) are populated only while the virtual machine is running; on a powered-off virtual machine these fields are empty or 0, which is normal.
EnabledState=3 indicates Disabled (powered off). The identity fields ElementName and Name(GUID) are always readable and are unaffected by run state.
